features.name: action_dx_toward_target_cx
action_dy_toward_target_cy
action_moves_toward_target_center
features.source:
def f3(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    to_target_x = target_cx - robot_x
    to_target_y = target_cy - robot_y
    dot = a[0] * to_target_x + a[1] * to_target_y
    return dot > 0

features.name: action_dx_toward_passage0_wall
action_dy_toward_passage0_gap_center
features.source:
def f5(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    to_gap = gap_center - robot_y
    return (a[1] > 0) if (to_gap > 0) else (a[1] < 0)

features.name: aligned_with_passage0_gap_and_dx_toward_wall
features.source:
def f6(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_base_radius
    aligned = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    robot_x = s[0]
    wall_x = s[19]
    to_wall_x = wall_x - (robot_x + robot_base_radius)
    dx_toward_wall = (a[0] > 0) if (to_wall_x > 0) else (a[0] < 0)
    return aligned and dx_toward_wall

features.name: left_of_passage0_wall_and_dx_positive
inside_passage0_zone
features.source:
def f8(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = wall_x + s[27] + robot_base_radius
    inside = (robot_x + robot_base_radius >= wall_x) and (robot_x + robot_base_radius < wall_right)
    return inside

features.name: inside_passage0_zone_and_dx_positive

    return inside and (a[0] > 0)

features.name: passed_passage0_wall_and_dx_positive
aligned_with_passage0_gap_and_dy_small
features.source:
def f11(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_base_radius
    aligned = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    return aligned and (abs(a[1]) < 0.05)

features.name: not_aligned_with_passage0_gap_and_dy_toward_gap
features.source:
def f12(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    aligned = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    to_gap = gap_center - robot_y
    dy_toward_gap = (a[1] > 0) if (to_gap > 0) else (a[1] < 0)
    return (not aligned) and dy_toward_gap

features.name: dtheta_small
features.source:
def f13(s, a):
    return abs(a[2]) < 0.2

features.name: darm_zero
features.source:
def f14(s, a):
    return abs(a[3]) < 1e-6

features.name: vac_zero
features.source:
def f15(s, a):
    return abs(a[4]) < 1e-6

features.name: left_of_target_and_dx_positive
below_target_and_dy_positive
above_target_and_dy_negative
right_of_target_and_dx_negative
robot_inside_target_region
features.source:
def f20(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    robot_left = robot_x - robot_base_radius
    robot_right = robot_x + robot_base_radius
    robot_bottom = robot_y - robot_base_radius
    robot_top = robot_y + robot_base_radius
    inside_x = (robot_left >= target_x) and (robot_right <= target_x + target_width)
    inside_y = (robot_bottom >= target_y) and (robot_top <= target_y + target_height)
    return inside_x and inside_y

features.name: robot_near_target
features.source:
def f21(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    dx = target_cx - robot_x
    dy = target_cy - robot_y
    dist = (dx * dx + dy * dy) ** 0.5
    return dist < 0.3

features.name: dx_positive_and_dy_positive
features.source:
def f22(s, a):
    return (a[0] > 0) and (a[1] > 0)

features.name: dx_and_dy_small

    return (abs(a[0]) < 0.01) and (abs(a[1]) < 0.01)

features.name: near_obstacle0_and_dx_positive
features.source:
def f33(s, a):

    robot_y = s[1]
    obstacle0_cx = s[19] + s[27] / 2.0
    obstacle0_cy = s[20] + s[28] / 2.0
    dx = obstacle0_cx - robot_x
    dy = obstacle0_cy - robot_y
    dist = (dx * dx + dy * dy) ** 0.5
    return (dist < 0.2) and (a[0] > 0)

    obstacle1_cx = s[29] + s[37] / 2.0
    obstacle1_cy = s[30] + s[38] / 2.0

features.name: between_obstacle0_and_obstacle1_y
features.source:
def f35(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    ob0_y0 = s[20]
    ob0_y1 = s[20] + s[28]
    ob1_y0 = s[30]
    ob1_y1 = s[30] + s[38]
    lower = min(ob0_y1, ob1_y0)
    upper = max(ob0_y1, ob1_y0)
    return (robot_y > lower) and (robot_y < upper)

features.name: dx_positive_and_not_in_target
features.source:
def f36(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    robot_left = robot_x - robot_base_radius
    robot_right = robot_x + robot_base_radius
    robot_bottom = robot_y - robot_base_radius
    robot_top = robot_y + robot_base_radius
    inside_x = (robot_left >= target_x) and (robot_right <= target_x + target_width)
    inside_y = (robot_bottom >= target_y) and (robot_top <= target_y + target_height)
    inside = inside_x and inside_y
    return (not inside) and (a[0] > 0)

    return left_of_obstacles and (a[0] > 0)

features.name: dx_positive_and_in_target_region
features.source:
def f47(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    robot_left = robot_x - robot_base_radius
    robot_right = robot_x + robot_base_radius
    robot_bottom = robot_y - robot_base_radius
    robot_top = robot_y + robot_base_radius
    inside_x = (robot_left >= target_x) and (robot_right <= target_x + target_width)
    inside_y = (robot_bottom >= target_y) and (robot_top <= target_y + target_height)
    inside = inside_x and inside_y

features.name: dx_positive_and_not_in_target_and_not_near_obstacles
features.source:
def f48(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    robot_left = robot_x - robot_base_radius
    robot_right = robot_x + robot_base_radius
    robot_bottom = robot_y - robot_base_radius
    robot_top = robot_y + robot_base_radius
    inside_x = (robot_left >= target_x) and (robot_right <= target_x + target_width)
    inside_y = (robot_bottom >= target_y) and (robot_top <= target_y + target_height)
    inside = inside_x and inside_y
    ob0_cx = s[19] + s[27] / 2.0
    ob0_cy = s[20] + s[28] / 2.0
    ob1_cx = s[29] + s[37] / 2.0
    ob1_cy = s[30] + s[38] / 2.0
    d0 = ((robot_x - ob0_cx) ** 2 + (robot_y - ob0_cy) ** 2) ** 0.5
    d1 = ((robot_x - ob1_cx) ** 2 + (robot_y - ob1_cy) ** 2) ** 0.5
    return (not inside) and (d0 > 0.3) and (d1 > 0.3) and (a[0] > 0)

features.name: dx_positive_and_not_in_passage0_zone_and_y_not_aligned
features.source:
def f49(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = wall_x + s[27] + robot_base_radius
    inside = (robot_x + robot_base_radius >= wall_x) and (robot_x + robot_base_radius < wall_right)
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_base_radius
    aligned = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    return (not inside) and (not aligned) and (a[0] > 0)

features.name: dx_positive_and_in_passage0_zone_and_y_near_gap_center
features.source:
def f50(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = wall_x + s[27] + robot_base_radius
    inside = (robot_x + robot_base_radius >= wall_x) and (robot_x + robot_base_radius < wall_right)
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    offset = robot_y - gap_center
    return inside and (abs(offset) < 0.1) and (a[0] > 0)

features.name: dx_positive_and_in_passage0_zone_and_y_far_from_gap_center
features.source:
def f51(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = wall_x + s[27] + robot_base_radius
    inside = (robot_x + robot_base_radius >= wall_x) and (robot_x + robot_base_radius < wall_right)
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    offset = robot_y - gap_center
    return inside and (abs(offset) >= 0.1) and (a[0] > 0)

features.name: dx_positive_and_in_passage0_zone_and_dtheta_small
features.source:
def f52(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = wall_x + s[27] + robot_base_radius
    inside = (robot_x + robot_base_radius >= wall_x) and (robot_x + robot_base_radius < wall_right)
    return inside and (a[0] > 0) and (abs(a[2]) < 0.2)

features.name: f53
features.description: Robot is close to the passage gap center in y compared to its own radius.
features.source:
def f53(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    gap_center = (s[20] + s[28]/2 + s[30] + s[38]/2) / 2
    # But gap_center is provided in summaries; reconstruct for passage0
    # passage0_gap_lower = s[20] + s[28]
    # passage0_gap_upper = s[30]
    # passage0_gap_center = (passage0_gap_lower + passage0_gap_upper) / 2
    # But since obstacle0 is below, obstacle1 is above,
    # passage0_gap_center = (s[20] + s[28] + s[30]) / 2
    # But more robust: use obstacle0 top and obstacle1 bottom
    obstacle0_top = s[20] + s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    passage0_gap_center = (obstacle0_top + obstacle1_y) / 2
    return abs(robot_y - passage0_gap_center) < 2 * robot_r

features.name: f54
features.description: Robot is within one robot radius above or below the passage gap center.
features.source:
def f54(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    obstacle0_top = s[20] + s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    passage0_gap_center = (obstacle0_top + obstacle1_y) / 2
    return (robot_y > passage0_gap_center - robot_r) and (robot_y < passage0_gap_center + robot_r)

features.name: f55
features.description: Action moves robot closer to passage gap center in y.
features.source:
def f55(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    next_y = robot_y + dy
    obstacle0_top = s[20] + s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    passage0_gap_center = (obstacle0_top + obstacle1_y) / 2
    dist_now = abs(robot_y - passage0_gap_center)
    dist_next = abs(next_y - passage0_gap_center)
    return dist_next < dist_now

features.name: f56
features.description: Robot is below the passage gap center and action moves up in y.
features.source:
def f56(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    obstacle0_top = s[20] + s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    passage0_gap_center = (obstacle0_top + obstacle1_y) / 2
    return (robot_y < passage0_gap_center) and (dy > 0)

features.name: f57
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap center and action moves down in y.
features.source:
def f57(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    obstacle0_top = s[20] + s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    passage0_gap_center = (obstacle0_top + obstacle1_y) / 2
    return (robot_y > passage0_gap_center) and (dy < 0)

features.name: f58
features.description: Action moves robot toward the passage gap in x while robot is above the gap.
features.source:
def f58(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    passage_left = s[19]
    passage_right = s[19] + s[27]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    gap_center_y = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    # Use obstacle0 as passage wall
    dx = a[0]
    # Robot is left of passage wall
    left_of_wall = robot_x + robot_r < passage_left
    # Robot is above the gap center
    above_gap = robot_y - gap_center_y > robot_r
    # Action moves right (toward passage)
    dx_toward_passage = dx > 0
    return left_of_wall and above_gap and dx_toward_passage

features.name: f59
features.description: Action moves robot downward when robot is above the passage gap center.
features.source:
def f59(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    gap_center_y = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    dy = a[1]
    above_gap = robot_y - gap_center_y > robot_r
    dy_downward = dy < 0
    return above_gap and dy_downward

features.name: f60
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves away from the gap center in y.
features.source:
def f60(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    gap_center_y = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    dy = a[1]
    above_gap = robot_y - gap_center_y > robot_r
    # If above gap, moving further up is away from gap center
    moves_away = dy > 0
    return above_gap and moves_away

features.name: f61
features.description: Robot is past the passage wall and action moves rightward (further from wall).
features.source:
def f61(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    passage_right = s[19] + s[27]
    dx = a[0]
    passed_wall = robot_x - robot_r > passage_right
    dx_right = dx > 0
    return passed_wall and dx_right

features.name: f62
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot leftward in x.
features.source:
def f62(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    passage_gap_lower = s[27] + s[28]  # obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height
    passage_gap_upper = s[30]          # obstacle1_y
    passage_gap_center = (passage_gap_lower + passage_gap_upper) / 2.0
    dx = a[0]
    # Robot is above the gap center (with clearance for its radius)
    above_gap = (robot_y - passage_gap_center) > robot_radius
    # Action moves left in x
    dx_negative = dx < 0.0
    return above_gap and dx_negative

features.name: f63
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot downward in y.
features.source:
def f63(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    passage_gap_lower = s[27] + s[28]
    passage_gap_upper = s[30]
    passage_gap_center = (passage_gap_lower + passage_gap_upper) / 2.0
    dy = a[1]
    above_gap = (robot_y - passage_gap_center) > robot_radius
    dy_negative = dy < 0.0
    return above_gap and dy_negative

features.name: f64
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source:
def f64(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    passage_gap_lower = s[27] + s[28]
    passage_gap_upper = s[30]
    passage_gap_center = (passage_gap_lower + passage_gap_upper) / 2.0
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    above_gap = (robot_y - passage_gap_center) > robot_radius
    dx_negative = dx < 0.0
    dy_negative = dy < 0.0
    return above_gap and dx_negative and dy_negative

features.name: f65
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action does not reduce y-distance to gap center.
features.source:
def f65(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    passage_gap_lower = s[27] + s[28]
    passage_gap_upper = s[30]
    passage_gap_center = (passage_gap_lower + passage_gap_upper) / 2.0
    dy = a[1]
    above_gap = (robot_y - passage_gap_center) > robot_radius
    # If robot is above gap, moving up increases distance to gap center
    moves_away_from_gap_y = dy > 0.0
    return above_gap and moves_away_from_gap_y

features.name: f66
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot further away from the passage gap center in y.
features.source:
def f66(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    passage_gap_center = s[20] + s[28]/2 + (s[30] - s[20] - s[28])/2
    # But per schema, passage gap center is obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + (obstacle1_y - (obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height)) / 2
    # obstacle0_y = s[20], obstacle0_height = s[28], obstacle1_y = s[30]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    gap_center = gap_lower + (gap_upper - gap_lower) / 2
    # Above gap means robot_y > gap_upper + robot_radius
    above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper + robot_radius
    # Action moves robot further away from gap center in y
    next_robot_y = robot_y + a[1]
    dist_now = abs(robot_y - gap_center)
    dist_next = abs(next_robot_y - gap_center)
    moves_away = dist_next > dist_now
    return above_gap and moves_away

features.name: f67
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot leftward in x.
features.source:
def f67(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper + robot_radius
    dx_neg = a[0] < 0
    return above_gap and dx_neg

features.name: f68
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source:
def f68(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper + robot_radius
    dx_neg = a[0] < 0
    dy_neg = a[1] < 0
    return above_gap and dx_neg and dy_neg

features.name: f69
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot downward in y.
features.source:
def f69(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper + robot_radius
    dy_neg = a[1] < 0
    return above_gap and dy_neg

features.name: f70
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot leftward or downward.
features.source:
def f70(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_radius = s[3]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper + robot_radius
    dx_neg = a[0] < 0
    dy_neg = a[1] < 0
    return above_gap and (dx_neg or dy_neg)

features.name: f71
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot further away from the passage gap center in x.
features.source:
def f71(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    passage_gap_center = s[20] + s[28]/2 + (s[30] - s[20] - s[28])/2
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28]
    gap_upper = s[30]
    robot_above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper
    robot_x = s[0]
    wall_left = s[19]
    wall_right = s[19] + s[27]
    gap_center_x = (wall_left + wall_right) / 2
    dist_x_now = abs(robot_x - gap_center_x)
    dx = a[0]
    dist_x_next = abs((robot_x + dx) - gap_center_x)
    return robot_above_gap and (dist_x_next > dist_x_now)

features.name: f72
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot closer to the left wall in x.
features.source:
def f72(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    gap_upper = s[20] + s[28] + (s[30] - (s[20] + s[28]))
    robot_above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper
    robot_x = s[0]
    wall_left = s[19]
    dx = a[0]
    dist_now = abs(robot_x - wall_left)
    dist_next = abs((robot_x + dx) - wall_left)
    return robot_above_gap and (dist_next < dist_now)

features.name: f73
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot downward in y more than in x.
features.source:
def f73(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    gap_upper = s[20] + s[28] + (s[30] - (s[20] + s[28]))
    robot_above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper
    dx = abs(a[0])
    dy = abs(a[1])
    return robot_above_gap and (dy > dx) and (a[1] < 0)

features.name: f74
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.

features.name: f75
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source: def f75(s, a): robot_y=s[1]; r=s[3]; gap_lower=s[20]+s[28]+r; gap_upper=s[30]-r; gap_center=(gap_lower+gap_upper)/2.0; aligned=(robot_y>=gap_lower) and (robot_y<=gap_upper); to_gap=gap_center-robot_y; dy_toward_gap=(a[1]>0) if (to_gap>0) else (a[1]<0); return (not aligned) and dy_toward_gap and (abs(a[1])>abs(a[0]))\n

features.name: f76
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source: def f76(s, a): robot_y=s[1]; r=s[3]; gap_lower=s[20]+s[28]+r; gap_upper=s[30]-r; gap_center=(gap_lower+gap_upper)/2.0; aligned=(robot_y>=gap_lower) and (robot_y<=gap_upper); to_gap=gap_center-robot_y; dy_toward_gap=(a[1]>0) if (to_gap>0) else (a[1]<0); return (not aligned) and dy_toward_gap and (abs(a[1])>abs(a[0]))\n

features.name: f77
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source: def f77(s, a): robot_x=s[0]; robot_y=s[1]; r=s[3]; wall_x=s[19]; dist=wall_x-(robot_x+r); gap_lower=s[20]+s[28]+r; gap_upper=s[30]-r; aligned=(robot_y>=gap_lower) and (robot_y<=gap_upper); return (0<dist<0.2) and (not aligned) and (abs(a[0])<abs(a[1]))\n

features.name: f78
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source: def f78(s, a): robot_x=s[0]; robot_y=s[1]; r=s[3]; target_cx=s[9]+s[17]/2.0; target_cy=s[10]+s[18]/2.0; wall_right=s[19]+s[27]+r; in_or_past=(robot_x+r)>=s[19]; return in_or_past and ((target_cx-robot_x)>abs(target_cy-robot_y)) and (a[0]>0)\n

features.name: f79
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source: def f79(s, a): robot_y=s[1]; r=s[3]; gap_lower=s[20]+s[28]+r; gap_upper=s[30]-r; gap_center=(gap_lower+gap_upper)/2.0; aligned=(robot_y>=gap_lower) and (robot_y<=gap_upper); return (not aligned) and (abs(robot_y-gap_center)>0.05) and (abs(a[1])>0.02)\n

features.name: f80
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source: def f80(s, a): robot_y=s[1]; r=s[3]; gap_lower=s[20]+s[28]+r; gap_upper=s[30]-r; gap_center=(gap_lower+gap_upper)/2.0; aligned=(robot_y>=gap_lower) and (robot_y<=gap_upper); return aligned and (abs(robot_y-gap_center)<0.05) and (abs(a[1])<0.02)\n

features.name: f81
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source: def f81(s, a): robot_x=s[0]; robot_y=s[1]; r=s[3]; wall_x=s[19]; dist=wall_x-(robot_x+r); gap_lower=s[20]+s[28]+r; gap_upper=s[30]-r; gap_center=(gap_lower+gap_upper)/2.0; aligned=(robot_y>=gap_lower) and (robot_y<=gap_upper); to_gap=gap_center-robot_y; dy_toward_gap=(a[1]>0) if (to_gap>0) else (a[1]<0); return (0<dist<0.2) and (not aligned) and dy_toward_gap\n

features.name: f82
features.description: Robot is above the passage gap and action moves robot diagonally down-left.
features.source: def f82(s, a): robot_x=s[0]; robot_y=s[1]; r=s[3]; wall_x=s[19]; gap_lower=s[20]+s[28]+r; gap_upper=s[30]-r; aligned=(robot_y>=gap_lower) and (robot_y<=gap_upper); return ((robot_x+r)<wall_x) and aligned and (a[0]>0) and (abs(a[1])<abs(a[0]))\n
